change_policy: Changing any target requires a new slo_version with a written reason; results already recorded under an older version are never rescored under a newer one.

availability_percent.measurement: per trading day: (seconds primary stream connected) / (seconds market open); from ConnectionState gaps in the daily report

quote_freshness_p99_seconds.measurement: p99 of (received_at - provider_event_time) over accepted live-stream quotes; historical downloads are exempt (provenance, not freshness)

missing_interval_rate_percent.measurement: sum of gap durations / market-open duration per day

duplicate_rate_percent.measurement: quarantined duplicate_quote count / total quotes per day

out_of_order_rate_percent.measurement: out_of_order_quote flag count / total quotes per day

raw_hash_verification_percent.measurement: every ingest re-reads and re-hashes stored raw bytes; any mismatch is a fatal incident

daily_deterministic_replay_percent.measurement: daily re-parse of the day's raw blobs must byte-reproduce the accepted quote log

stale_quote_treated_as_tradable_count.measurement: quotes with stale_quote flag AND tradable=true in the accepted log; scorecard-fatal

future_timestamp_accepted_count.measurement: contract rejects provider_event_time > received_at + 2.0s clock allowance; any acceptance is scorecard-fatal

multi_writer_incident_count.measurement: ExclusiveLock contention events where a second writer acquired the same quote log

unacknowledged_critical_incident_count.measurement: critical incidents in incident_report.json without a human acknowledgement entry

provider_limitations_declared: Dukascopy datafeed (historical) has no freshness SLO: files are fetched minutes-to-years after event time by design; measured lag is recorded as provenance (collection_mode=historical_download), not as an SLO breach.
Dukascopy endpoint shows intermittent 503/timeouts; availability SLO applies to the OANDA live stream, while Dukascopy fetch failures count as fetch incidents with retry evidence.
ALFRED supplies no intraday release timestamps; release-time freshness for macro is bounded by vintage_date only and is flagged provider_does_not_supply_release_time.
